name: Pull Request
about: Describe this pull request
title: '[PR]: '
labels: ''
assignees: ''
---

## Description

Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed. Please also include relevant motivation and context.

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of change

Please delete options that are not relevant.

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor (improves structure without changing behavior)
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Code style update (formatting, local variables)
- [ ] Test related
- [ ] Build related
- [ ] DevOps related
- [ ] Security related
- [ ] Other (please describe):

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and downloaded
- [ ] I have checked my code for any possible security vulnerabilities
- [ ] I have added any necessary licenses or attributions
- [ ] I have updated the dependencies as needed
- [ ] I have ensured that the code works on all supported browsers/devices
- [ ] I have ensured that the code works on all supported operating systems

## Screenshots (if applicable):

Please add screenshots or videos to help explain the problem and/or solution.

## Additional context

Add any other context about the pull request here.
